settings.title: Sleep Like P.J.
settings.text: Save more when you bundle your personalized picks.

custom_css: .revy-bundle-action {width: 100%; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center;}

settings.question: What’s included in the bedding bundle?
settings.answer: Our Pro Sleep System bundle includes everything you need for a perfect night’s sleep: your choice of 2 Performance® Pillows, a Mattress, Mattress Protector, Comforter, and a set of Performance® Sheets.

settings.question: Can I choose the type of pillows included?
settings.answer: Yes! You can select from our complete range of full-priced Performance Pillows. Take our Pillow I.D. quiz to see which pillows are right for you.

settings.question: Do the items in the bundle feature cooling technology?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Our mattresses, pillows, sheets and protectors all feature our advanced cooling technology.

settings.question: Can I buy these items individually?
settings.answer: Yes, all items in the bundle are available for purchase separately. However, the bundle offers exclusive savings that are not available when purchasing items individually unless added to your cart from the P.J. Washington Page

settings.question: How is the bundle shipped?
settings.answer: Each item in the bundle is shipped directly to your door. Shipping is fast and free within the contiguous U.S..

settings.question: Can I finance the bundle purchase?
settings.answer: Yes, we offer easy financing options at checkout so you can pay over time.

settings.title: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.text: Quick Answers to questions you may have.
settings.content_text: Can't Find what you're looking for?
